title: TimeseriesSnapshot
description: Wire payload for a sliding-window numeric metric (slice 3a.1.4). Receiver semantics: snapshot-of-window with regular cadence — subscribers get the current N samples in one frame, not a stream of discrete events. Mirrors modules/app-observability/.../metrics/TimeseriesSnapshot.java.

resourceId.description: Matches the Resource registry entry's id. Allows multiplexed streams to disambiguate.

windowMs.description: Total window length in milliseconds (e.g. 30 * 60 * 1000 for a 30-minute trend).

sampleIntervalMs.description: Regular sample cadence in milliseconds. values.length is implicitly floor(windowMs / sampleIntervalMs).

unit.description: Free-form unit label (count, rate/s, bytes, %, etc.). V1 does not enforce a vocabulary; FE renderers display verbatim.

values.description: Sliding-window samples, ordered oldest-first. Length implicitly floor(windowMs / sampleIntervalMs).

catalogVersion.description: Monotonic version counter for SSE clients to detect missed frames (matches the seq on the universal envelope per slice 436).
